meta.title: Pato Anabalon — Senior Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior Software Engineer, 18+ years in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js and .NET C#. In Santiago, aiming for Auckland, NZ.

hero.title: Pato Anabalon
hero.tagline: 18+ years turning complex ideas into accessible products people enjoy using.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio1: It was 1996. I was 12 when I met my first computer — and fell for it instantly. Not long after, I broke it trying to make it faster. Almost three decades on, that same obsession still drives me: making complicated things feel effortless. Today it takes the shape of an 18-year career as a Senior Software Engineer across banking, real estate, and aviation.
about.bio2: Now I'm at LATAM Airlines, working on one of Latin America's largest e-commerce platforms. In an IT organisation of ~400 engineers I'm the person teammates come to when the code needs to be right — not just shipped. In 2025 I received LATAM's Service Leaders award, which quietly confirms what I've always believed: you can lead without giving up the keyboard.
about.bio3: What's next? Ideally Auckland — I spent late 2025 there studying English at NZLC and fell completely for the city, its people, and its culture. I'm looking for a company willing to sponsor a work visa (my immigration advisor makes that part painless). Conversations with teams elsewhere are also welcome. If you value craft as much as outcomes, let's talk.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.subheading: A career built on delivery, leadership & continuous growth

description: Developed responsive and accessible UI components for Cabin Upgrade products and Dynamic Bundle of ancillaries in the flight, fares, and seat selection flows across LATAM's e-commerce platforms.
Designed and executed A/B experiments in production environment using Google Optimize and ABSmartly, improving purchase conversion.
Participated in the leadership of the Engage & Booking cluster and automated internal processes and reporting.
Designed and implemented responsive web solutions using Svelte framework.
Delivered performance-focused UI components reducing load times and improving UX.
Built sales and ancillary services modules using React.js, Next.js, Jest, RTL, Storybook and WebdriverIO.
Participated in Globant's mentoring program, helping semi-senior developers to grow professionally.
Led digital transformation overseeing frontend, backend, and Salesforce teams via Scrum.
Designed and implemented highly scalable cloud architecture on AWS.
Drove alignment between business stakeholders and technical teams during platform digitalisation.
Co-founded and led the technical strategy of a proptech startup focused on real estate investment.
Developed the "Webi" real estate investment platform as full-stack developer.
Represented the startup in Start-Up Chile G19 acceleration programme.
Led the development and technical direction of an automotive loan platform for Scotiabank, Bice Bank, and Amicar.
Acted as Technical Lead guiding architectural decisions and mentoring junior developers.
Designed, developed, and maintained automotive credit management systems over 10 years.

latamAward.text: LATAM Service Leader — recognized for Safety, Sustainability and J.E.T.S. values

globantAward.text: Constantly Innovate — annual company-wide award given for being the most recognized employee at StarMeUp with the value of constantly innovation

startupChile.text: Selected for Start-Up Chile G19 acceleration programme

yearsCoding.text: Years of experience shipping quality production code across various industries and technologies

database.description: Relational and NoSQL stores — PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server and MySQL.

cloud.description: Provisioning and scaling on AWS, GCP and modern edge platforms with Terraform.

ai.description: Working alongside Claude, Cursor and Codex to move faster with intent.

devops.description: Version control and delivery pipelines — Git platforms, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Jenkins and Heroku.

observability.title: Observability & APIs
observability.description: Metrics, analytics, docs and integrations — Grafana, Dynatrace, Looker, Swagger, SendGrid, Slack API and ABSmartly.

tools.title: Dev Tools
tools.description: Code quality, planning boards, agile methods and platform integrations that keep teams shipping.

creative.title: Creative
creative.description: When not writing code: motion graphics, video editing, visual and technical design.

creative.heading: Creative Work
creative.subheading: Audiovisual production, motion graphics & visual design
creative.description: Outside of engineering, I create audiovisual content — from motion graphics to video production. I use After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, and Photoshop to tell stories through moving images.
